CVE-2018-18655.title: Prayer through 1.3.5 sends a Referer header, containing a user's  ...
CVE-2018-18655.description: Prayer through 1.3.5 sends a Referer header, containing a user's username, when a user clicks on a link in their email because header.t lacks a no-referrer setting.
